subheadline: A senior, cross-functional team that ships accessible, fast interfaces and stays close to your roadmap.

members.name: Lea Fischer
members.bio: Leads research and design systems. Turns messy requirements into calm, testable interfaces teams can ship with confidence.

members.name: Mara Weiss
members.bio: Builds component libraries and performance budgets. Obsessed with sub-second loads and keyboard-first interaction patterns.

members.name: Noah Ritter
members.bio: Audits every release against WCAG 2.2 AA. Pairs with engineers so fixes land before launch, not after.

members.name: Jonas Klein
members.bio: Onboards new teams and runs quarterly reviews. Closes the loop between customer feedback and the product roadmap.
